        mem.pt_walk(vaddr).complete,

name: pt_walk_deterministic

name: max_phyaddr_width_gap
reason: `MAX_PHYADDR_WIDTH` is `external_body` with value 52 but axiom only constrains to `32..=52` — the actual value could be any width in that range, making MASK_ADDR and all address masks potentially wrong
